meta.title: Water: The (Potentially) Most Cyber-Resilient CI Sector
meta.description:
It begins with a bold assertion: the Water Sector can be the most cyber-resilient critical infrastructure sector.

The Water Sector has a poor reputation when it comes to cybersecurity, but fortunately it is positioned to be the most cyber-resilient. Andrew revealed several big advantages available to the water sector and how you can leverage them in your Water Sector OT-security programs. 

Note: Even if you aren't in the water sector, watch this session to get ideas about how you might identify and leverage the unique characteristics of your sector.

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
